purpose: Best-effort public Nitter instance pool for public X account monitoring.
important_limitations: Instances are operated by third parties and can fail, rate-limit, block GitHub Actions or disappear without notice.
Nitter uses X's unofficial API; collection completeness cannot be guaranteed.
No single instance is treated as authoritative.
The ingest tries RSS first where enabled and falls back to the public HTML timeline.

instances.notes: Listed as online and working in the official Nitter wiki on 2026-07-18.
